query_normalized: assessing the sensitivity of regression coefficients to dataset subset selection statistics
rationale: This paper addresses the user's question by providing foundational methodology (category d) and empirical-theoretical bounds (category c) for how regression coefficient estimators (specifically their variance and error) behave under different dataset subset selection strategies (A-optimal design, volume sampling, and worst-case sampling). Although the paper focuses on experimental design rather than post-hoc sensitivity analysis, it directly measures the mechanism of how subset selection impacts
